content: We can reframe Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-view Self-Refine pipeline. This modified framework would generate conflicting critiques of the LLM's initial output from divergent reasoning perspectives at each iteration, rather than using a single generic self-feedback, to surface more hidden flaws than single-perspective self-feedback can catch.
